The '''Sluis Van Shipyards''' were a series of [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] shipbuilding complexes stationed over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].

==History==
The facility was considered to be the best of its kind in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. However, because the [[Sluissi]] found shipbuilding to be akin to a form of art (in addition to their rather ponderous system of bureaucracy), they were also considered to be one of the slowest [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

The shipyards were at one point built up to encompass an entire world, similar to the [[Kuat Drive Yards Orbital Array]] and [[Mon Calamari Orbital Shipyards]] of later millennia.

[[File:Orbit_Dock_V-475.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Orbit Dock V-475.]]

During the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Sluis Van Shipyards included [[Sluis Van Orbit Dock V-475]], a [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] space dock.

During the opening campaigns of the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]], the shipyards were the site of a major [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship-theft [[Battle of Sluis Van|raid]] that involved fifty-one [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]] stolen from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] mining facility [[Nomad City]] on the extremely hot but ore-rich planet of [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]]. Through a series of coordinated attacks, Thrawn had engineered a large number of [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defence Fleet]]'s [[capital ship]]s to be at the shipyards for repairs. Having concentrated them in one place, he used the miners as makeshift [[Boarding craft/Legends|boarding craft]] to cut into the hulls of the ships and insert boarding parties of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]]. The plan was initially set to be a success due to the surprise from the unorthodox tactics.

The raid was thwarted through the timely actions of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who realized Thrawn's plan and used Lando's override codes to simultaneously activate the drills of the mole miners. This depressurized the ship's bridges and killed most of the standard stormtroopers while [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and the pilots of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] killed the spacetroopers. Though forced into retreat, Thrawn was satisfied that the New Republic's victory had been a costly one.<ref name="HttE">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>

In the years after the Thrawn crisis, the yards would continue to prosper.
